error_signature: Lovable UI not rendering webhook response
title: Lovable UI not displaying objects and styles from webhook
symptom: The Lovable UI is receiving the webhook response but fails to render the objects and styles for user selection. Users are unable to proceed as they cannot see the options.
applies_when: Webhook response contains objects and styles
not_this_if: Error messages are displayed in n8n
root_cause: The Lovable UI may require specific response headers to properly interpret and display the data received from the webhook. Without these headers, the UI might not render the content correctly, leading to a lack of visible options for the user.
fix_steps: Add the necessary response headers in the webhook settings
Test the webhook again to ensure the UI displays the objects and styles
agent_instruction: Ensure to add the required response headers in the webhook settings to enable proper rendering in Lovable UI.
